document.title: 사양승인원 삼성전자 의료기기 MI69-01896A Pad-detector upp
authorityOrJurisdiction: Health& Medical Equipment Product Engineering Group

sourceSummary.oneLine: Specification approval package for Samsung Electronics material code MI69-01896A, Pad-detector upp (4343), supplied by ㈜와이엔씨.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Used to approve and control part specifications, inspection criteria, process quality controls, packing method, and technical document provision for the Pad-detector upp component.
keyPoints: Material code MI69-01896A has revision 00 and EC history date 20221011 for 신규 승인.
Part description is Pad-detector upp (4343), model Detector, vendor ㈜와이엔씨.
Accepted specifications include 453.0 mm ±3.0 mm dimensions, 424.0 g ±10% weight, SW_A 편골판지 : S120*S120 material, Natural color, and assembly fit confirmation.
Inspection report dated 2022-10-11 records dimensional and weight measurements judged OK.
Process Quality Control Plan identifies PVS category and controls receiving, lamination, cutting, packing, outgoing inspection, and shipping steps.
The part should not contain substances specified in 00Q2-0083K.

evidence.claim: The document concerns material code MI69-01896A.
The part description is Pad-detector upp (4343).
The model listed for the part is Detector.
The vendor is ㈜와이엔씨.
The revision is 00.
The document records an E.D date of 2022.10.11.
EC history records revision 00 dated 20221011 with comment 신규 승인.
Accepted dimensions are 453.0 mm ±3.0 mm in two directions.
Accepted standard weight is 424.0 g ±10%.
Accepted material is SW_A 편골판지 : S120*S120.
Accepted color condition is Natural.
The inspection report dated 2022-10-11 judged measured dimensions and weight OK.

The Product Inspection Criteria require no drawing-based specification issues, weight within ±10%, matching material composition, no exterior deformation/damage/contamination/gaps, and no corrugated board separation after lamination.
evidence.evidenceText: ■ 품질관리 Point...- 도면기준 규격 문제 없을 것...- 지정된 중량 범위[±10%] 벗어나지 않을 것...- 원지 구성은 도면과 일치 할 것...- 변형/파손/오염/벌어짐 등 외관 문제 없을 것...- 합지 후 골판지 떨어짐 없을 것
